dataList.name: Iron Maiden - Defibrillation
dataList.desc: Upon entry, хилит 30 IQ

dataList.name: Hunter's Mark
dataList.desc:
Every 3 turns, select a random enemy, reduce their Speed to 1, и target it with all of this unit's Skills
(Если this effect could not be activated due to Stagger, activate it на следующий ход)

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ и получает [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] by ([UnlockBuff_Base] стадии + 1) (Один раз за ход)

Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 1 [PressureOfPrescript] и 5 [KarmaOfIndexStudent]
- Если this unit не have [UnlockBuff_Base], получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] в конце хода
- При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], не получает [KarmaOfIndexStudent]
- Если this unit is under the effect of Effloresced[TabExplain] Э.Г.О::Procuration, double [KarmaOfIndexStudent] this unit will получает

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: При 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] или при 90%-/70%-/50%- ХП,
- Получает [UnlockBuff_1]/[UnlockBuff_2]/[UnlockBuff_3]
- Хилит to 45 IQ
- тратит все [PressureOfPrescript] и выходит из стаггера
- Получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] in the turn after [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained for the first time

Если [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained based on ХП conditional above,
- Получает [KarmaOfIndexStudent] by (sum of healed IQ / 15)
- Increase [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] to 3/6/9 если this unit had less than 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]; получает 1 [DefenseDown] и 2 [KarmaOfIndexStudent] на следующий ход за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] стаков gained

минимальная и максимальная скорость +10 in the turn this unit uses its powerful attack

dataList.name: Concentration
dataList.desc:
При [UnlockBuff_3], накладывает the following effects:
- [BlandishmentShinEnemyDelete], получает Shield равный 50% of макс. ХП (lasts до конца битвы)
- Intensify [PressureOfPrescript] to [PressureOfPrescript_2nd] и макс. out its стаков
- Начало хода: Получает 1 [PressureOfPrescript_2nd]

dataList.name: Desperate Struggle
dataList.desc:
- Начало хода: Получает 3 [SupportProtect]
- Когда Опекун Большого выигрывает клеш, и uses an Attack against the target, follow up with "Colpi Sottani" as an Unopposed Attack against the same target (2 раз за ход)
dataList.flavor:
'Maybe I can kill her now. Maybe this is my chance.'

Once again, the same contemplation comes to seize Lucio as he looms over his master, who lies fast asleep.
But this impulse remains an unactioned thought, for he had both fear born from experience и gratitude for his deliverance from the Backstreets.
Yet, his resentment runs too deep. Lucio makes a promise with himself, even as he swears utter fealty without a trace of deception:
'Once this battle is behind us, I will kill her. I will gouge out her other eye и stab и slash при her, again и again, until she no longer moves.'
For the first time, fire burns in the eyes of the boy whose body is covered in bruises.

dataList.name: Authority Unbroken
dataList.desc: Получает -50% final урона если "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is on the field

dataList.name: The Eye of Precognition
dataList.desc:
Когда this unit enters the Encounter, получает 30 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
При 0 [FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков, convert [FutureEyeOnMirror] to [FutureEyeOffMirror]
dataList.flavor: This Relic, known as the Eye of Odin, is but a third of a whole Relic that was broken в three parts.

dataList.name: Accelerating Future
dataList.desc: In a Clash, получает 1 [LookingFuture] with every Clash Can получает up to ([FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков при Turn Start / 3) [LookingFuture] per turn While this unit has [FutureEyeOnMirror], getting attacked by Unopposed Attacks или losing a Clash activates the "Precognition" Skill
dataList.flavor: "The more we clash, the hotter my sword will become... и accelerate to bring us to the future I foresaw."

dataList.name: Overloaded
dataList.desc:
The following causes this unit toтеряет [FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков:
- Если this unit fails to получает [LookingFuture], теряет 1 [FutureEyeOnMirror] with every Clash
- Когда this unit is attacked by an Unopposed Attack, теряет 1 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
- On Clashтеряет, теряет 3 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
dataList.flavor: 'The eye's heating up, its socket is starting to ache, и my vision is turning red.'

dataList.name: La Spada di Palermo
dataList.desc:
Наносит +15% more урона against Shields за каждые Burn на главной цели (макс. 300%)
On Skill Use, если target's Attack Skill is either a Slash или a Pierce Skill, Сила клеша +1
Если this unit's Skill effects triggered [VibrationExplosion], получает 2 [AttackDmgUp] на следующий ход (3 раз за ход)
Если this unit hit Critically with its Skill effects, хилит 5 IQ

dataList.name: The Shame of Famiglia Bognatelli
dataList.desc:
Получает -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion:*Изжоги*], <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>, <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color> , <sprite name="Sinking"><color=#e30000><u><link="Sinking"><noparse>Депрессии</noparse></link></u></color> ; -30% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]
При 1+ [AccelBullet], Skills that spend [AccelBullet] наносит +30% урона и наносит +150% урона against Shields
Получает 4  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> за каждые [AccelBullet] spent
Когда flipping a Coin that spends [AccelBullet], не cancel the attack even если this unit не have Acceleration Round
dataList.flavor:
"You were an inheritor of the Palermitan style и a wielder of our family heirloom—you had every privilege one could ever hope for. How dare you embarrass yourself like this?"
"We'll let you keep the Relic и the sword, for they have been defiled by your dishonorable stench."
"To be promoted to the station of a Sottocapo, an Underboss... only to be ousted in a mere 3 days. No one else has suffered such pathetic humiliation apart from you, Valencina."
"You are the shame of our family. La Famiglia Bognatelli withdraws its love from you."

dataList.name: Shin (心) - Valencina
dataList.desc: при получении удара, или когда "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is defeated, получает [ObsessionAndGreed] на следующий ход
dataList.flavor: "*sigh* Okay. So, you're saying we can get Ticket back by going in и wrecking the place according to that fanatic's plan... Is this really going to bring Ticket back to us?"

dataList.name: Lucio, you useless little shit!
dataList.desc: Когда "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is defeated, activate "Time to Hunt" Passive

dataList.name: Time to Hunt
dataList.desc:
Начало хода: Если this unit is Staggered, выходит из стаггера

Select a random Sinner и наносит [TeachersPrey]
- Activates every 4 turns after the initial activation
- Если this unit kills the target with the Skill "Disposal," activate it again на следующий ход
dataList.flavor:
The Palermitan Style has much in common with the originator of the sword technique—La Famiglia Bognatelli.
Both the Famiglia и the sword style are renowned for relentlessly focusing on a single prey during a hunt, which is concluded with a Coup de Grâce that may as well be called a dissection. These executions are not carried out in the shadows, but вместо этого, proudly put on display for all to behold.
The spectacular и formidable sword style has granted the Famiglia much honor и prestige, eventually securing them a place among the Sette Famiglie of the Backstreets.
Valencina, a master of the Palermitan Style, used it to hunt и execute many officers и so-called battle-hardened soldiers during the Smoke War, becoming a veritable "War Hero."
Ironically, no one could have imagined her fall would sink as low as her fame once soared.

dataList.name: Vengeance Tattoos [<s>Great Brother</s>]
dataList.desc:
Takes -30% урона from [Combustion:*Изжоги*], <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>, [Vibration], и <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color>  (округляется вниз)
-50% to the amount of Stagger Threshold raised (округляется вниз)

dataList.name: The Book of Vengeance
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Наносит [VengeanceBookSpider] on all Sinners

Если this unit hit with more than 3 Skills this turn, получает 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpider] на следующий ход за каждые excess Skill that hit

dataList.name: My Daughter's Education
dataList.desc:
При победе в клеше, получает 1 [DaughterEducationSpider]

On Hit with a Skill, получает 1 [DaughterEducationSpider] (один раз за скилл; this effect не activate for Cracked Coins)

При победе в клеше with the first-used Skill in a turn, получает 1 more [DaughterEducationSpider] и the Skill gains Сила монет +1

dataList.name: Resentment
dataList.desc:
при получении удара by 2 Skills, получает 1 [ResentmentSpider] итеряет 1 [DaughterEducationSpider] (number of hits taken is always tracked)

При макс. [ResentmentSpider] стаков, use a powerful attack

Конец хода: при менее чем 90% / 60% / 40% ХП, макс. out this unit's [ResentmentSpider] стаков

dataList.name: Vengeance Tattoos макс. Output... Unseal Стоячая елда аниматроника!
dataList.desc: Когда [MiddleFatherSwordFour] is unsealed, this unit gains [MiddleFatherGutsMirror]

dataList.name: Am I doing this right, Papa?!
dataList.desc:
Begins Encounter with [HeatingWireOffSpider]

Начало хода: При 3+ [GotACompliment], получает [HeatingWireOnSpider] и also наносит [Combustion:*Изжоги*] with Skills that наносит <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>
- Конец хода: при менее чем 3 [GotACompliment], convert this unit's [HeatingWireOnSpider] to [HeatingWireOffSpider]

Если "Опекун Среднего - Matthias" has [MiddleFatherSwordFour], this unit не enter [HeatingWireOffSpider] state
dataList.flavor: "I like my papa because he always praises me и buys me comic books."

dataList.name: МГЕ Братья: татушки сигмы
dataList.desc: Если this unit hit with more than 2 Skills, получает 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpiderDaughter] на следующий ход за каждые excess Skill that hit
dataList.flavor: 'Will the bigger Sisters и Brothers of the Middle accept me as their family one day, so I can continue to live with them?'

dataList.name: Praise is the Wind in Her Sail
dataList.desc:
При победе в клеше, получает 1 [GotACompliment]

On Hit with a Skill, получает 1 [GotACompliment] (один раз за скилл; this effect не activate for Cracked Coins)

При победе в клеше with the first-used Skill in a turn, получает 1 more [GotACompliment] и the Skill gains Сила монет +1

dataList.name: I'm pretty sure the Middle never forgets
dataList.desc:
при получении удара by 2 Skills, получает 1 [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] итеряет 1 [GotACompliment] (number of hits taken is always tracked)

При макс. [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] стаков, use a powerful attack

Конец хода: при менее чем 80% / 60% / 40% ХП, макс. out this unit's [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] стаков

dataList.name: Риен, Опекун Указательного
dataList.desc: Получает -50% урона from Unopposed Attacks Получает -50% урона from [Combustion:*Изжоги*], Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , и Депрессии Когда healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], если this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит IQ up to 15 Начало битвы: Получает [BurningWoundRien_Mask] и хилит IQ up to 30 При 55%- ХП, end the turn и получает a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], change [StackRienSpecialSkill] стаков to 9
dataList.flavor:
I waited for "the moment" as the Prescript told me to.
Even after my darling daughter left, I waited.

And after a while, I was contacted by Limbus Company, и saw that the Backdoor was open.
That's когда the device beeped и let me know that it was finally time to bring my daughter home.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus]
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword] - [RienWeapon04Rapier] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword] - [RienWeapon07Lance] - [RienWeapon08Chain] - [RienWeapon09Scythe] Когда using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained один раз за скилл; не получает стаков from the same Skill twice Начало хода: При 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Attack End: After using the powerful Skill for the first time, получает [Shin_Rien] - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - минимальная и максимальная скорость +15 - Конец хода: Получает 1 [Vulnerable] и 2 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Turn 3 Start: при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 3) [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Then, activate this effect every 3 turns
dataList.flavor:
A vial of what looks like liquid metal capable of changing its shape и mass, its qualities almost like those of Singularities, swishes inside the Device.
The form the fluid takes is contingent on the Prescript the Device receives. The weapons it produces depend on the information regarding the target и the time limit given to carry out the assassination.
One day, as he received a dagger too small for the task, he elected to wait until it produced a different weapon. However, despite the approaching deadline, it refused to provide him a proper weapon; he had no choice but to kill his target with a fork.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Получает [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии на себе - Накладывает [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - Когда using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to Вечные монеты Когда attacking, если [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или если this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the least current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - Когда the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или если the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Наносит +2.5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 20%) - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], наносит +30% урона against all targets
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me to raise a family?

"It must've been fate that brought us together. To think that I'd ever meet a husband like you..."

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 10 IQ и получает 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Если this unit не have [UnlockBuff_Base], получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] в конце хода - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], не получает [KarmaOfIndexRien]
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me toтеряет my family?

"Honey, I gotta получает a quick trip up north today."
"Ah, also—hey, buddy. I'm expecting a package this afternoon, so would you be a dear и pick it up for me, sweetheart?"

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: При 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] или при 95%-/85%-/75%- ХП,
- Получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]/[UnlockBuff_Rien2]/[UnlockBuff_Rien3]

Turn 1 End: При lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии 1, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]
Turn 2 End: При lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии 2, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien2]

Когда gaining [UnlockBuff_Base] for the first time, если this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит up to 15 IQ

Когда [UnlockBuff_Base] is activated due to ХП или Turn conditionals:
- при менее чем 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] стаков, raise the стаков to 3/6/9 и получает 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] при the на следующий ход Start за каждые стаков gained
dataList.flavor: "Following the Prescripts is to unlock what is locked."

dataList.name: Риен, the Father [Imitation]
dataList.desc: Получает -75% урона from Unopposed Attacks Получает -75% урона from [Combustion:*Изжоги*], Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , и Депрессии Когда healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], если this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит up to 15 IQ Когда this unit enters a new phase при 55% ХП, получает the following effects: - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - Получает [IndexPrescript_RienSecondPhase] - Convert [BurningWoundRien_Mask] to [BurningWoundRien] - Convert [KarmaOfIndexRien] to [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]; then получает 10 Stacks of that effect - Если this unit не have [Shin_Rien], immediately получает that effect При 25% или lower ХП, получает a new pattern и greatly enhance a certain Skill
dataList.flavor:
Once, he harbored a suspicion that he was being shaped в an imitation of someone; he doubted the Will и nearly defied it, for he did not know whom he was to mimic. Only когда it was too late did he understand its intent и come to accept the Prescript's will.
Only then was the false father completed.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus] - Full Unlock
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet2phase] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto2phase] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon04Rapier2phase] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer2phase] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon07Lance2phase] - [RienWeapon08Chain2phase] - [RienWeapon09Scythe2phase] Когда using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained один раз за скилл; не получает стаков from the same Skill twice - не получает стаков from a Skill used only in a special pattern Начало хода: При 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - минимальная и максимальная скорость +15 - Конец хода: Получает 2 [Vulnerable] и 3 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Activate the following, starting from the turn in which the phase changed - Every 3 turns, при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 5) [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]
dataList.flavor: An unparalleled weapon и a curse bestowed by Hermes, a god of the City whose Prescripts are distributed by radio waves.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Накладывает [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - Когда using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to Вечные монеты - Получает [Protection] равный [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 9) · Теряет 1 стак за каждые 20 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] Когда attacking, если [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или если this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the least current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - Когда the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или если the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Наносит +5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 40%) - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], наносит +50% урона against all targets Starting from the first turn after the phase change, активирует следующие эффекты: - Начало хода: Получает [BlackNightmare] · Если this unit used a powerful attack в прошлом ходу, теряет [BlackNightmare] for that turn - Когда gaining [BlackNightmare], Если у этого юнита есть fewer than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, activate a unique pattern
dataList.flavor:
I raised a family.

"You're not supposed to be here right now."
"My work is still much underway, и I'd like to carve them up in peace so they can attain the most exquisite beauty I can sculpt."
"... Don't tell me, are you here to defy the Prescript?"

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ и получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] - Если this unit used a powerful Skill this turn, получает 12 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 2 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] вместо этого
dataList.flavor:
I... lost my family.

"Don't go..."
"Don't go... Not... like this... Daddy... Please... help us..."

dataList.name: All of My Corpus has been Given to Tibia
dataList.desc:
Получает -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion:*Изжоги*], [Vibration], <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color> , и <sprite name="Sinking"><color=#e30000><u><link="Sinking"><noparse>Депрессии</noparse></link></u></color> 
Получает -50% урона from <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>

Начало хода: Если this unit is Staggered, выходит из стаггера. Afterward, получает 2 [CrimsonTakeDamageUp] и becomes unable to use 'Installation Art no. 3: Improvised Ribcage' until на следующий ход (один раз за бой)

Конец хода: Получает 1 [DefenseDown] на следующий ход за каждые 4 [Combustion:*Изжоги*] на себе (макс. 15)

dataList.name: Allow Me to Briefly Enjoy My Pupil's Exhibition
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [SupportProtect], теряет 1 [SupportProtect] on Clash Start (один раз за скилл)

dataList.name: Visitors Must Respect the Rules of the Gallery
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [SupportProtect], теряет 1 [SupportProtect] on Clash Start (один раз за скилл)

dataList.name: With this Artwork, I will Prove Myself before the Maestro
dataList.desc: при менее чем 20 IQ когда Опекун Безымянного enters the Encounter, хилит IQ to 20

dataList.name: Please, Do Stop Running и Be Seated
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Наносит [RedemptionTheRings] на следующий ход to the Sinner with the fastest Speed
